def analyze_scores(students):
    total = sum(s["score"] for s in students)
    average = total / len(students)

    maximum = max(s["score"] for s in students)
    minimum = min(s["score"] for s in students)

    above_avg = sum(1 for s in students if s["score"] > average)

    passing = sum(1 for s in students if s["score"] >= 60)

    return {
        "average": average,
        "max": maximum,
        "min": minimum,
        "above_average": above_avg,
        "passing": passing,
    }
